honest-test/src/honest_test/numeric.py:1: The Fibonacci sequence has a huge gap near 1_000_000 (832040 then 1346269), so any limit in (832040, 1346269] yields the identical sequence. +1 does not cross a Fibonacci value, so fibonacci_sequence and numeric_values are unchanged. Verified fib(1000000)==fib(1000001).
As above: -1 stays within the (832040, 1346269] gap, so the generated sequence is identical. Verified fib(1000000)==fib(999999).
honest-test/src/honest_test/coverage_dat: indent= controls only JSON whitespace; the serialized document parses to the identical structure, and honest-check reads coverage.json back via json.loads, so the indentation is not part of the cross-tool contract. Verified the parsed object is identical for indent 1/2/3.
As above: indent= is cosmetic whitespace only; the parsed document is identical and honest-check reads it via json.loads.
Every watch-list path is module.attr with exactly one dot, so rsplit('.', 1) and rsplit('.', 2) return the same two parts. No watch-list entry has two dots.
Removing the trailing `return None` in nondeterminism_finding lets the function fall off its end, which returns None implicitly — identical to the explicit return.
honest-test/src/honest_test/honesty.py:s: _name reads link_meta(link).get('name'); @link always sets name == the function __name__, and a non-link callable has no 'name' key (link_meta returns {}). So get('name') is either the __name__ or None, and `or getattr(__name__)` yields the same string whether the key is 'name' or ''. No constructible link makes name differ from __name__.
Emptying the 'server' key makes map_fault_to_http('server') miss the dict and hit the .get default, which is also 500 — the same result. The server category maps to 500 either way.
honest-test/src/honest_test/honesty.py:r: Removing verify_purity's final `return None` (reached only when the two runs are equal) lets the function fall off its end and return None implicitly — identical.
Removing detect_mutation's final `return None` (reached only when the manifest was not mutated) lets the function fall off its end and return None implicitly — identical.
